features.name: interface with modport output signal
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog interface with a logic signal and a modport that declares the signal as output

features.name: interface with modport input signal
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog interface with a logic signal and a modport that declares the signal as input

features.name: module port typed with modport interface
features.description: Code should include a module with a port typed using a modport-qualified interface type (e.g., simple_if.driver)

features.name: interface signal driven through modport
features.description: Code should include an assign statement driving an interface signal through a modport-typed port connection

features.name: interface instance passed to modules with different modports
features.description: Code should include an interface instance being passed to multiple modules using different modport types on the same interface
